case_title: GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP, INC.DBA BAY CITY GUIDE VS SAN FRANCISC0 GUIDE, INC.

docket_entries.description: VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY DEFENDANT; NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27451, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP, INC.DBA BAY CITY GUIDE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISC0 GUIDE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISC0 GUIDE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP, INC.DBA BAY CITY GUIDE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISC0 GUIDE, INC. $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $952.00, VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISC0 GUIDE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP, INC.DBA BAY CITY GUIDE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISC0 GUIDE, INC. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27451 ON 1/28/04 NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $86 IN COURT COST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
